title: Human Resource Business Partner
description:
We’re Hiring: Human Resource Business Partner

Creating Moments. Connecting Members. Building Community.

Our people are at the heart of our success, and we are looking for someone who shares our passion for creating a workplace where everyone thrives. As our Human Resource Business Partner, you will work closely with our leadership teams to align people strategies with our goals, driving initiatives that support growth, engagement, and a vibrant culture.

In this role, you will be a trusted advisor, helping leaders navigate HR challenges and supporting them in nurturing potential while fostering a culture of excellence. It’s not just about policies and procedures, it’s about building real connections, driving positive changes, and shaping a workplace where people grow.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Manage day-to-day HR operations, maintaining employee records and ensuring HR systems run smoothly.
  • Support payroll administration by preparing and verifying payroll data, ensuring accuracy, confidentiality, and compliance with statutory requirements in coordination with the Finance team.  
  • Support the recruitment process, from developing job descriptions to sourcing, interviewing, and onboarding top talent.
  • Assist in Compensation & Benefits activities, including salary benchmarking, preparation of annual increment proposals, allowances, and benefits-related documentation.
  • Collaborate with department heads to align HR initiatives with business goals.
  • Assist in developing internal and external employer branding strategies to strengthen brand presence across platforms.
  • Contribute to employee engagement initiatives, keep our people inspired and engaged.
  • Assist in refining HR workflows, policies, and procedures, ensuring our department operates smoothly and aligns harmoniously with the club's objectives.
  • Take the lead on HR projects to promote continuous improvement and enhance operational efficiency.
  • Drive HR projects focused on continuous improvement, all while enhancing our operational efficiency.
  • Ability to take on various HR-related tasks and projects as assigned by the HR Director.

Requirements:

  • Diploma or Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
  • At least 3 years of experience in HR operations, recruitment, and employee engagement, ideally in the F&B, hospitality, or service industry.
  • Experienced with HRIS migration projects and familiarity with Info-Tech (HRIS) is a plus.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office; knowledge of Canva is a bonus.
  • A team player, able to work independently in a fast-paced environment.
  • Proactive and results-driven, able to meet deadlines and get things done efficiently.
  • A clear communicator with a positive attitude, always eager to learn and grow.
  • Excellent time management skills, with the ability to solve problems and stay organised.
  • Passionate about enhancing the employee experience and building a positive workplace culture.
  • Detail-oriented, people-focused, and bringing a positive, upbeat energy to the team.

Why Join Us?

At Singapore Swimming Club, this isn’t just a job - it’s your chance to be part of the energy that brings our community to life. From sports and social activities and events to food and fun, you’ll join a warm, collaborative team that values creativity, initiative, and joy in the everyday. Do what you love while creating meaningful experiences for our members.

postedCompany.description:
Who are we?

Nestled in the peaceful surroundings of Tanjong Rhu, Singapore Swimming Club has been a cherished members-only haven since 1894. Spanning over 30,000 square meters of lush grounds, the Club blends rich heritage with vibrant community spirit and now offers direct access via Katong Park MRT (TEL).

From Olympic-sized pools and modern training facilities to tennis, squash, pickleball, and more, members of all ages enjoy a wide range of sports and wellness options. A fully equipped gym, bowling centre, and a variety of dining choices enhance the experience.

More than a club, Singapore Swimming Club is a place where friendships are built, families connect, and every visit feels like coming home.

Why join us?

At Singapore Swimming Club, this isn’t just a job it’s your chance to be part of the energy that brings our community to life. From sports and social activities and events to food and fun, you’ll join a warm, collaborative team that values creativity, initiative, and joy in the everyday. Do what you love while creating meaningful experiences for our members.
postedCompany.name: Singapore Swimming Club

districts.location: D15 Katong, Joo Chiat, Amber Road
